<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. What would it do? -->

## What problem does it solve?
<!-- What are you currently unable to do, or what feels frustrating? -->

## How would you use it?
<!-- Walk me through how you'd use this feature day-to-day -->

## Any examples?
<!-- Have you seen this done well in another app? Link or describe it -->

- [ ] iOS

- [ ] Both
